text: A map can show rivers, roads, mountains, and city names.
Home networks often contain printers, phones, routers, and streaming boxes.
Configuration files are usually stored as plain text for portability.
Python projects often include tests, package metadata, and command line scripts.
Astronomy studies planets, stars, comets, and the motion of celestial bodies.
Garden soil, watering schedules, sunlight, and mulch all affect plant health.
A benchmark should be reproducible and should publish the data and code it uses.
Neutral calibration text can stabilize the background estimate for retrieval comparisons.
